availableCommands.name: debug
availableCommands.description: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues (bundled)

availableCommands.name: simplify
availableCommands.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: batch
availableCommands.description: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5–30 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: loop
availableCommands.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) (bundled)

availableCommands.name: claude-api
availableCommands.description:
Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK.
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK.
DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: gsd:settings
availableCommands.description: Configure GSD workflow toggles and model profile (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:plan-phase
availableCommands.description: Create detailed phase plan (PLAN.md) with verification loop (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:add-todo
availableCommands.description: Capture idea or task as todo from current conversation context (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:insert-phase
availableCommands.description: Insert urgent work as decimal phase (e.g., 72.1) between existing phases (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:join-discord
availableCommands.description: Join the GSD Discord community (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:verify-work
availableCommands.description: Validate built features through conversational UAT (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:audit-milestone
availableCommands.description: Audit milestone completion against original intent before archiving (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:debug
availableCommands.description: Systematic debugging with persistent state across context resets (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:research-phase
availableCommands.description: Research how to implement a phase (standalone - usually use /gsd:plan-phase instead) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:update
availableCommands.description: Update GSD to latest version with changelog display (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:discuss-phase
availableCommands.description: Gather phase context through adaptive questioning before planning (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:help
availableCommands.description: Show available GSD commands and usage guide (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:progress
availableCommands.description: Check project progress, show context, and route to next action (execute or plan) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:remove-phase
availableCommands.description: Remove a future phase from roadmap and renumber subsequent phases (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:resume-work
availableCommands.description: Resume work from previous session with full context restoration (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:add-phase
availableCommands.description: Add phase to end of current milestone in roadmap (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:execute-phase
availableCommands.description: Execute all plans in a phase with wave-based parallelization (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:quick
availableCommands.description: Execute a quick task with GSD guarantees (atomic commits, state tracking) but skip optional agents (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:new-project
availableCommands.description: Initialize a new project with deep context gathering and PROJECT.md (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:cleanup
availableCommands.description: Archive accumulated phase directories from completed milestones (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:set-profile
availableCommands.description: Switch model profile for GSD agents (quality/balanced/budget) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:health
availableCommands.description: Diagnose planning directory health and optionally repair issues (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:map-codebase
availableCommands.description: Analyze codebase with parallel mapper agents to produce .planning/codebase/ documents (user)

## Voice Output (TTS)

When responding, wrap your natural language prose in `«tts»...«/tts»` markers for text-to-speech.

Rules:
- ONLY wrap conversational prose meant to be spoken aloud
- Do NOT wrap: code, file paths, commands, tool output, URLs, lists, errors
- Keep markers on same line as text (no line breaks inside)

Examples:
✓ «tts»I'll help you fix that bug.«/tts»
✓ «tts»The tests are passing.«/tts» Here's what changed:
✗ «tts»src/Header.tsx«/tts»  (file path - don't wrap)
✗ «tts»npm install«/tts»  (command - don't wrap)
<!-- TTS_VOICE_OUTPUT_END -->

     7→
     8→export function registerWorkspaceHandlers(
     9→  sessionStore: SessionStore,

    11→): void {
    12→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:get', () => sessionStore.getWorkspace())
    13→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:save', (_, workspace) => sessionStore.saveWorkspace(workspace))
    14→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getMetaProjectsPath', () => getMetaProjectsPath())
    15→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:getCategoryMetaPath', (_, categoryName: string) => {
    16→    const basePath = getMetaProjectsPath()
    17→    // Sanitize category name for filesystem
    18→    const safeName = categoryName.replace(/[/\\:*?"<>|]/g, '_')
    19→    return join(basePath, safeName)
    20→  })
    21→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProject', async () => {
    22→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    23→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    24→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    25→      title: 'Select Project Folder'
    26→    })
    27→    return result.canceled ? null : result.filePaths[0] || null
    28→  })
    29→
    30→  ipcMain.handle('workspace:addProjectsFromParent', async () => {
    31→    const mainWindow = getMainWindow()
    32→    const result = await dialog.showOpenDialog(mainWindow!, {
    33→      properties: ['openDirectory'],
    34→      title: 'Select Parent Folder (all subdirectories will be added as projects)'
    35→    })
    36→    if (result.canceled || !result.filePaths[0]) return null
    37→
    38→    const parentDir = result.filePaths[0]
    39→
    40→    try {
    41→      const entries = readdirSync(parentDir, { withFileTypes: true })
    42→      const subdirs = entries
    43→        .filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory() && !entry.name.startsWith('.'))
    44→        .map((entry) => ({
    45→          path: join(parentDir, entry.name),
    46→          name: entry.name
    47→        }))
    48→      return subdirs
    49→    } catch (e) {

     2→import { TileLayout } from '../components/TiledTerminalView'
     3→
     4→type ViewMode = 'tabs' | 'tiled'
     5→
     6→interface UseViewStateReturn {
     7→  viewMode: ViewMode
     8→  tileLayout: TileLayout[]
     9→  lastFocusedTabId: string | null
    10→  sidebarWidth: number
    11→  sidebarCollapsed: boolean
    12→  setViewMode: (mode: ViewMode) => void
    13→  setTileLayout: (layout: TileLayout[]) => void
    14→  setLastFocusedTabId: (id: string | null) => void
    15→  setSidebarWidth: (width: number) => void
    16→  setSidebarCollapsed: (collapsed: boolean) => void
    17→  toggleViewMode: () => void
    18→}
    19→
    20→export function useViewState(): UseViewStateReturn {
    21→  const [viewMode, setViewModeState] = useState<ViewMode>('tabs')
    22→  const [tileLayout, setTileLayout] = useState<TileLayout[]>([])
    23→  const [lastFocusedTabId, setLastFocusedTabId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    24→  const [sidebarWidth, setSidebarWidth] = useState(280)
    25→  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false)
    26→
    27→  const setViewMode = useCallback((mode: ViewMode) => {
    28→    setViewModeState(mode)
    29→    // Trigger resize events to force terminals to refit after view mode change
    30→    setTimeout(() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize')), 50)
    31→    setTimeout(() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize')), 150)
    32→    setTimeout(() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize')), 300)
    33→  }, [])
    34→
    35→  const toggleViewMode = useCallback(() => {
    36→    setViewMode(viewMode === 'tabs' ? 'tiled' : 'tabs')
    37→  }, [viewMode, setViewMode])
    38→
    39→  return {
    40→    viewMode,
    41→    tileLayout,
    42→    lastFocusedTabId,
    43→    sidebarWidth,
    44→    sidebarCollapsed,
    45→    setViewMode,
    46→    setTileLayout,
    47→    setLastFocusedTabId,
    48→    setSidebarWidth,
    49→    setSidebarCollapsed,
    50→    toggleViewMode
    51→  }
    52→}

     1→import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { TileLayout } from '../components/TiledTerminalView'
     3→
     4→type ViewMode = 'tabs' | 'tiled'
     5→
     6→interface UseViewStateReturn {
     7→  viewMode: ViewMode
     8→  tileLayout: TileLayout[]
     9→  lastFocusedTabId: string | null
    10→  sidebarWidth: number
    11→  sidebarCollapsed: boolean
    12→  setViewMode: (mode: ViewMode) => void
    13→  setTileLayout: (layout: TileLayout[]) => void
    14→  setLastFocusedTabId: (id: string | null) => void
    15→  setSidebarWidth: (width: number) => void
    16→  setSidebarCollapsed: (collapsed: boolean) => void
    17→  toggleViewMode: () => void
    18→}
    19→
    20→export function useViewState(): UseViewStateReturn {
    21→  const [viewMode, setViewModeState] = useState<ViewMode>('tabs')
    22→  const [tileLayout, setTileLayout] = useState<TileLayout[]>([])
    23→  const [lastFocusedTabId, setLastFocusedTabId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    24→  const [sidebarWidth, setSidebarWidth] = useState(280)
    25→  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false)
    26→
    27→  const setViewMode = useCallback((mode: ViewMode) => {
    28→    setViewModeState(mode)
    29→    // Trigger resize events to force terminals to refit after view mode change
    30→    setTimeout(() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize')), 50)
    31→    setTimeout(() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize')), 150)
    32→    setTimeout(() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize')), 300)
    33→  }, [])
    34→
    35→  const toggleViewMode = useCallback(() => {
    36→    setViewMode(viewMode === 'tabs' ? 'tiled' : 'tabs')
    37→  }, [viewMode, setViewMode])
    38→
    39→  return {
    40→    viewMode,
    41→    tileLayout,
    42→    lastFocusedTabId,
    43→    sidebarWidth,
    44→    sidebarCollapsed,
    45→    setViewMode,
    46→    setTileLayout,
    47→    setLastFocusedTabId,
    48→    setSidebarWidth,
    49→    setSidebarCollapsed,
    50→    toggleViewMode
    51→  }
    52→}
    53→
```

1→/**
     2→ * Settings Routes
     3→ *
     4→ * HTTP endpoints for application settings, voice configuration, and CLI status.
     5→ */
     6→
     7→import { Router, Request, Response } from 'express'
     8→import {
     9→  ApiResponse,
    10→  Settings,
    11→  VoiceSettings
    12→} from '../types'
    13→import { getServices } from '../app'
    14→
    15→const router = Router()
    16→
    17→// =============================================================================
    18→// Helper Functions
    19→// =============================================================================
    20→
    21→function sendResponse<T>(res: Response, statusCode: number, data: ApiResponse<T>): void {
    22→  res.status(statusCode).json(data)
    23→}
    24→
    25→function sendError(res: Response, statusCode: number, error: string): void {
    26→  sendResponse(res, statusCode, {
    27→    success: false,
    28→    error,
    29→    timestamp: Date.now()
    30→  })
    31→}
    32→
    33→// =============================================================================
    34→// Application Settings Routes
    35→// =============================================================================
    36→
    37→/**
    38→ * GET /api/settings
    39→ * Get application settings
    40→ *
    41→ * Returns: Settings
    42→ */
    43→router.get('/', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
    44→  try {
    45→    const services = getServices()
    46→
    47→    if (!services.getSettings) {
    48→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Settings service not available')
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    const settings: Settings = await services.getSettings()
    52→
    53→    sendResponse<Settings>(res, 200, {
    54→      success: true,
    55→      data: settings,
    56→      timestamp: Date.now()
    57→    })
    58→  } catch (error: any) {
    59→    console.error('[Settings Route] Get error:', error)
    60→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to get settings')
    61→  }
    62→})
    63→
    64→/**
    65→ * PUT /api/settings
    66→ * Save application settings
    67→ *
    68→ * Body: Settings
    69→ */
    70→router.put('/', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
    71→  try {
    72→    const services = getServices()
    73→
    74→    if (!services.saveSettings) {
    75→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Settings service not available')
    76→    }
    77→
    78→    const settings: Settings = req.body
    79→
    80→    // Basic validation
    81→    if (!settings || typeof settings !== 'object') {
    82→      return sendError(res, 400, 'Invalid settings data')
    83→    }
    84→
    85→    await services.saveSettings(settings)
    86→
    87→    sendResponse(res, 200, {
    88→      success: true,
    89→      timestamp: Date.now()
    90→    })
    91→  } catch (error: any) {
    92→    console.error('[Settings Route] Save error:', error)
    93→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to save settings')
    94→  }
    95→})
    96→
    97→/**
    98→ * PATCH /api/settings
    99→ * Partially update application settings
   100→ *
   101→ * Body: Partial<Settings>
   102→ */
   103→router.patch('/', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
   104→  try {
   105→    const services = getServices()
   106→
   107→    if (!services.getSettings || !services.saveSettings) {
   108→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Settings service not available')
   109→    }
   110→
   111→    const updates: Partial<Settings> = req.body
   112→
   113→    // Get current settings and merge
   114→    const currentSettings = await services.getSettings()
   115→    const newSettings = { ...currentSettings, ...updates }
   116→
   117→    await services.saveSettings(newSettings)
   118→
   119→    sendResponse<Settings>(res, 200, {
   120→      success: true,
   121→      data: newSettings,
   122→      timestamp: Date.now()
   123→    })
   124→  } catch (error: any) {
   125→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to update settings')
   126→  }
   127→})
   128→
   129→// =============================================================================
   130→// Voice Settings Routes
   131→// =============================================================================
   132→
   133→/**
   134→ * GET /api/settings/voice
   135→ * Get voice settings
   136→ *
   137→ * Returns: VoiceSettings
   138→ */
   139→router.get('/voice', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
   140→  try {
   141→    const services = getServices()
   142→
   143→    if (!services.voiceGetSettings) {
   144→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Voice service not available')
   145→    }
   146→
   147→    const settings: VoiceSettings = await services.voiceGetSettings()
   148→
   149→    sendResponse<VoiceSettings>(res, 200, {
   150→      success: true,
   151→      data: settings,
   152→      timestamp: Date.now()
   153→    })
   154→  } catch (error: any) {
   155→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to get voice settings')
   156→  }
   157→})
   158→
   159→/**
   160→ * POST /api/settings/voice/speak
   161→ * Speak text using TTS
   162→ *
   163→ * Body: { text: string }
   164→ */
   165→router.post('/voice/speak', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
   166→  try {
   167→    const services = getServices()
   168→
   169→    if (!services.voiceSpeak) {
   170→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Voice service not available')
   171→    }
   172→
   173→    const { text } = req.body
   174→
   175→    if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') {
   176→      return sendError(res, 400, 'text is required and must be a string')
   177→    }
   178→
   179→    // Limit text length to prevent abuse
   180→    if (text.length > 5000) {
   181→      return sendError(res, 400, 'text must be 5000 characters or less')
   182→    }
   183→
   184→    const result = await services.voiceSpeak(text)
   185→
   186→    sendResponse(res, result.success ? 200 : 500, {
   187→      success: result.success,
   188→      data: result.audioData ? { audioData: result.audioData } : undefined,
   189→      error: result.error,
   190→      timestamp: Date.now()
   191→    })
   192→  } catch (error: any) {
   193→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to speak text')
   194→  }
   195→})
   196→
   197→/**
   198→ * POST /api/settings/voice/stop
   199→ * Stop TTS playback
   200→ */
   201→router.post('/voice/stop', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
   202→  try {
   203→    const services = getServices()
   204→
   205→    if (!services.voiceStopSpeaking) {
   206→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Voice service not available')
   207→    }
   208→
   209→    const result = await services.voiceStopSpeaking()
   210→
   211→    sendResponse(res, result.success ? 200 : 500, {
   212→      success: result.success,
   213→      timestamp: Date.now()
   214→    })
   215→  } catch (error: any) {
   216→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to stop speaking')
   217→  }
   218→})
   219→
   220→// =============================================================================
   221→// CLI Status Routes
   222→// =============================================================================
   223→
   224→/**
   225→ * GET /api/settings/cli/status
   226→ * Get installation status of all CLI tools
   227→ *
   228→ * Returns: { claude, gemini, codex, opencode, aider }
   229→ */
   230→router.get('/cli/status', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
   231→  try {
   232→    const services = getServices()
   233→
   234→    const status: Record<string, any> = {}
   235→
   236→    // Check each CLI tool in parallel
   237→    const checks = await Promise.allSettled([
   238→      services.claudeCheck?.() ?? Promise.resolve({ installed: false }),
   239→      services.geminiCheck?.() ?? Promise.resolve({ installed: false }),
   240→      services.codexCheck?.() ?? Promise.resolve({ installed: false }),
   241→      services.opencodeCheck?.() ?? Promise.resolve({ installed: false }),
   242→      services.aiderCheck?.() ?? Promise.resolve({ installed: false })
   243→    ])
   244→
   245→    const cliNames = ['claude', 'gemini', 'codex', 'opencode', 'aider']
   246→
   247→    checks.forEach((result, index) => {
   248→      if (result.status === 'fulfilled') {
   249→        status[cliNames[index]] = result.value
   250→      } else {
   251→        status[cliNames[index]] = { installed: false, error: result.reason?.message }
   252→      }
   253→    })
   254→
   255→    sendResponse(res, 200, {
   256→      success: true,
   257→      data: status,
   258→      timestamp: Date.now()
   259→    })
   260→  } catch (error: any) {
   261→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to check CLI status')
   262→  }
   263→})
   264→
   265→/**
   266→ * GET /api/settings/cli/:tool
   267→ * Get installation status of a specific CLI tool
   268→ *
   269→ * Params: tool - one of: claude, gemini, codex, opencode, aider
   270→ */
   271→router.get('/cli/:tool', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
   272→  try {
   273→    const services = getServices()
   274→    const { tool } = req.params
   275→
   276→    const checkFunctions: Record<string, (() => Promise<any>) | undefined> = {
   277→      claude: services.claudeCheck,
   278→      gemini: services.geminiCheck,
   279→      codex: services.codexCheck,
   280→      opencode: services.opencodeCheck,
   281→      aider: services.aiderCheck
   282→    }
   283→
   284→    const checkFn = checkFunctions[tool]
   285→    if (!checkFn) {
   286→      return sendError(res, 400, `Unknown tool: ${tool}. Valid tools: ${Object.keys(checkFunctions).join(', ')}`)
   287→    }
   288→
   289→    const result = await checkFn()
   290→
   291→    sendResponse(res, 200, {
   292→      success: true,
   293→      data: result,
   294→      timestamp: Date.now()
   295→    })
   296→  } catch (error: any) {
   297→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to check CLI status')
   298→  }
   299→})
   300→
   301→export default router

     1→/**

    21→function sendResponse<T>(res: Response, statusCode: number, data: ApiResponse<T>): void {
    22→  res.status(statusCode).json(data)
    23→}
    24→
    25→function sendError(res: Response, statusCode: number, error: string): void {
    26→  sendResponse(res, statusCode, {
    27→    success: false,
    28→    error,
    29→    timestamp: Date.now()
    30→  })
    31→}
    32→

    46→

    77→

    83→    }
    84→
    85→    await services.saveSettings(settings)

    87→    sendResponse(res, 200, {

    94→  }
    95→})
    96→
    97→/**

   103→router.patch('/', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {

     1→import { app } from 'electron'

     5→

    24→  ttsVoice?: string           // Per-project TTS voice (overrides global)
    25→  ttsEngine?: 'piper' | 'xtts'  // Per-project TTS engine
    26→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider' // Per-project backend (overrides global)
    27→  categoryId?: string         // Category this project belongs to
    28→  order?: number              // Order within category or uncategorized list
    29→}
    30→
    31→export interface OpenTab {
    32→  id: string
    33→  projectPath: string
    34→  sessionId?: string
    35→  title: string
    36→  ptyId?: string
    37→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    38→}
    39→
    40→export interface TileLayout {
    41→  id: string
    42→  tabIds: string[]
    43→  activeTabId: string
    44→  x: number
    45→  y: number
    46→  width: number
    47→  height: number
    48→}
    49→
    50→export interface Workspace {
    51→  projects: Project[]
    52→  openTabs: OpenTab[]
    53→  activeTabId: string | null
    54→  viewMode?: 'tabs' | 'tiled'
    55→  tileLayout?: TileLayout[]
    56→  categories?: ProjectCategory[]
    57→}
    58→
    59→export interface WindowBounds {
    60→  x: number
    61→  y: number
    62→  width: number
    63→  height: number
    64→}
    65→
    66→export interface ThemeCustomization {
    67→  accentColor: string | null
    68→  backgroundColor: string | null
    69→  textColor: string | null
    70→  terminalColors: {
    71→    black?: string
    72→    red?: string
    73→    green?: string
    74→    yellow?: string
    75→    blue?: string
    76→    magenta?: string
    77→    cyan?: string
    78→    white?: string
    79→  } | null
    80→}
    81→
    82→export interface Settings {
    83→  defaultProjectDir: string
    84→  theme: string
    85→  themeCustomization?: ThemeCustomization | null
    86→  voiceOutputEnabled?: boolean
    87→  voiceVolume?: number
    88→  voiceSpeed?: number
    89→  voiceSkipOnNew?: boolean
    90→  voiceSilenceThreshold?: number
    91→  autoAcceptTools?: string[]
    92→  permissionMode?: string
    93→  backend?: 'default' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider'
    94→}
    95→
    96→
    97→interface StoredData {
    98→  workspace: Workspace
    99→  windowBounds?: WindowBounds
   100→  settings?: Settings
   101→}
   102→
   103→export class SessionStore {
   104→  private configPath: string
   105→  private backupPath: string
   106→  private data: StoredData
   107→
   108→  constructor() {
   109→    const configDir = join(app.getPath('userData'), 'config')
   110→    if (!existsSync(configDir)) {
   111→      mkdirSync(configDir, { recursive: true })
   112→    }
   113→    this.configPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json')
   114→    this.backupPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json.backup')
   115→    this.data = this.load()
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  private loadFile(path: string): StoredData | null {
   119→    try {
   120→      if (!existsSync(path)) return null
   121→      const stat = statSync(path)
   122→      if (stat.size === 0) return null
   123→      const content = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
   124→      const data = JSON.parse(content)
   125→      if (!data?.workspace) return null
   126→      return data
   127→    } catch (e) {
   128→      console.error(`[SessionStore] Failed to load ${path}:`, e)
   129→      return null
   130→    }
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  private load(): StoredData {
   134→    // Try main file first
   135→    const main = this.loadFile(this.configPath)
   136→    if (main && (main.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   137→      return main
   138→    }
   139→
   140→    // Main file is empty/corrupt/missing — try backup
   141→    const backup = this.loadFile(this.backupPath)
   142→    if (backup && (backup.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   143→      console.log('[SessionStore] Main config empty/corrupt, restored from backup (' +
   144→        backup.workspace.projects.length + ' projects)')
   145→      // Restore backup as main file immediately
   146→      try {
   147→        writeFileSync(this.configPath, JSON.stringify(backup, null, 2))
   148→      } catch (e) {
   149→        console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to restore backup to main:', e)
   150→      }
   151→      return backup
   152→    }
   153→
   154→    // If main loaded but had 0 projects (valid empty state), use it
   155→    if (main) return main
   156→
   157→    return {
   158→      workspace: {
   159→        projects: [],
   160→        openTabs: [],
   161→        activeTabId: null
   162→      }
   163→    }
   164→  }
   165→
   166→  private save(): void {
   167→    try {
   168→      const json = JSON.stringify(this.data, null, 2)
   169→
   170→      // Validate we can parse what we're about to write
   171→      JSON.parse(json)
   172→
   173→      // Back up existing file before overwriting (if it has content)
   174→      if (existsSync(this.configPath)) {
   175→        try {
   176→          const stat = statSync(this.configPath)
   177→          if (stat.size > 0) {
   178→            // Only update backup if existing file is valid and has projects
   179→            const existing = this.loadFile(this.configPath)
   180→            if (existing && (existing.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   181→              writeFileSync(this.backupPath, readFileSync(this.configPath))
   182→            }
   183→          }
   184→        } catch (e) {
   185→          console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to update backup:', e)
   186→        }
   187→      }
   188→
   189→      // Atomic write: write to temp file, then rename
   190→      const tmpPath = this.configPath + '.tmp'
   191→      writeFileSync(tmpPath, json)
   192→
   193→      // Verify the temp file was written completely
   194→      const written = readFileSync(tmpPath, 'utf-8')
   195→      JSON.parse(written) // throws if truncated/corrupt
   196→
   197→      renameSync(tmpPath, this.configPath)
   198→    } catch (e) {
   199→      console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to save workspace:', e)
   200→    }
   201→  }
   202→
   203→  getWorkspace(): Workspace {
   204→    return this.data.workspace
   205→  }
   206→
   207→  // Reload workspace from disk (useful when file was modified externally)
   208→  reloadFromDisk(): void {
   209→    console.log('[SessionStore] Reloading workspace from disk')
   210→    this.data = this.load()
   211→    console.log('[SessionStore] Reloaded, projects:', this.data.workspace?.projects?.length || 0)
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  saveWorkspace(workspace: Workspace): void {
   215→    // Protect against overwriting populated workspace with empty one
   216→    const incomingProjects = workspace?.projects?.length || 0
   217→    const currentProjects = this.data.workspace?.projects?.length || 0
   218→    if (incomingProjects === 0 && currentProjects > 0) {
   219→      console.log('[SessionStore] Rejected empty workspace save - current has', currentProjects, 'projects')
   220→      return
   221→    }
   222→    this.data.workspace = workspace
   223→    this.save()
   224→    syncMetaProjects(workspace)
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  getWindowBounds(): WindowBounds | undefined {
   228→    return this.data.windowBounds
   229→  }
   230→
   231→  saveWindowBounds(bounds: WindowBounds): void {
   232→    this.data.windowBounds = bounds
   233→    this.save()
   234→  }
   235→
   236→  getSettings(): Settings {
   237→    return this.data.settings ?? { defaultProjectDir: '', theme: 'default', backend: 'default' }
   238→  }
   239→
   240→  saveSettings(settings: Settings): void {
   241→    this.data.settings = settings
   242→    this.save()
   243→  }
   244→}
   245→
```

    67→export const useWorkspaceStore = create<WorkspaceState>((set, get) => ({

    72→
    73→  setProjects: (projects) => set({ projects }),

    78→      set({ projects: [...projects, project] })
    79→    }
    80→  },

    85→    set({ projects: projects.filter((p) => p.path !== path) })
    86→  },

    88→  updateProject: (path, updates) => {
    89→    const { projects } = get()

    92→        p.path === path ? { ...p, ...updates } : p
    93→      )

   100→      openTabs: [...openTabs, tab],
   101→      activeTabId: tab.id
   102→    })
   103→  },
   104→
   105→  removeTab: (id) => {
   106→    const { openTabs, activeTabId } = get()
   107→    const newTabs = openTabs.filter((t) => t.id !== id)
   108→    let newActiveId = activeTabId
   109→
   110→    if (activeTabId === id) {
   111→      const index = openTabs.findIndex((t) => t.id === id)
   112→      if (newTabs.length > 0) {
   113→        newActiveId = newTabs[Math.min(index, newTabs.length - 1)].id
   114→      } else {

   116→      }
   117→    }
   118→
   119→    set({ openTabs: newTabs, activeTabId: newActiveId })
   120→  },

   124→    set({
   125→      openTabs: openTabs.map((t) =>
   126→        t.id === id ? { ...t, ...updates } : t
   127→      )
   128→    })
   129→  },

   148→    const { categories } = get()
   149→    set({

   151→        c.id === id ? { ...c, ...updates } : c
   152→      )
   153→    })

   157→    const { categories, projects } = get()
   158→    set({
   159→      categories: categories.filter((c) => c.id !== id),
   160→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
   161→        p.categoryId === id ? { ...p, categoryId: undefined } : p
   162→      )
   163→    })
   164→  },

   166→  reorderCategories: (ids) => {

   171→        order: ids.indexOf(c.id)

   173→    })

   176→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath, categoryId) => {
   177→    const { projects } = get()
   178→    const categoryProjects = projects.filter((p) =>
   179→      categoryId === null ? !p.categoryId : p.categoryId === categoryId
   180→    )
   181→    const maxOrder = categoryProjects.reduce((max, p) => Math.max(max, p.order ?? -1), -1)
   182→    set({
   183→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
   184→        p.path === projectPath
   185→          ? { ...p, categoryId: categoryId ?? undefined, order: maxOrder + 1 }
   186→          : p
   187→      )
   188→    })
   189→  },
   190→
   191→  reorderProjects: (categoryId, projectPaths) => {
   192→    const { projects } = get()
   193→    set({

   196→        if (index >= 0) {
   197→          return { ...p, order: index }
   198→        }
   199→        return p
   200→      })
   201→    })
   202→  }

import { ipcRenderer } from 'electron'
import type { Workspace } from '../types/workspace.js'

export const workspaceHandlers = {
  getWorkspace: (): Promise<Workspace> => ipcRenderer.invoke('workspace:get'),
  saveWorkspace: (workspace: Workspace): Promise<void> => ipcRenderer.invoke('workspace:save', workspace),
  addProject: (): Promise<string | null> => ipcRenderer.invoke('workspace:addProject'),
  addProjectsFromParent: (): Promise<Array<{ path: string; name: string }> | null> => ipcRenderer.invoke('workspace:addProjectsFromParent'),
  getMetaProjectsPath: (): Promise<string> => ipcRenderer.invoke('workspace:getMetaProjectsPath'),
  getCategoryMetaPath: (categoryName: string): Promise<string> => ipcRenderer.invoke('workspace:getCategoryMetaPath', categoryName),

  discoverSessions: (projectPath: string, backend?: 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider') =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('sessions:discover', projectPath, backend)

1→import { useEffect, useRef, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import type { Api } from '../api'
     3→import type { BackendId } from '../api/types'
     4→import type { AppSettings } from './useSettings'
     5→import { useWorkspaceStore } from '../stores/workspace'
     6→import { Theme, getThemeById, applyTheme, themes } from '../themes'
     7→import { cleanupOrphanedBuffers } from '../components/terminal/Terminal'
     8→
     9→interface UseWorkspaceLoaderOptions {
    10→  api: Api
    11→  checkInstallation: () => Promise<void>
    12→  setViewMode: (mode: 'tabs' | 'tiled') => void
    13→  setTileLayout: (layout: any[]) => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→interface UseWorkspaceLoaderReturn {
    17→  loading: boolean
    18→  currentTheme: Theme
    19→  settings: AppSettings | null
    20→  setCurrentTheme: (theme: Theme) => void
    21→  setSettings: (settings: AppSettings | null) => void
    22→}
    23→
    24→export function useWorkspaceLoader({
    25→  api,
    26→  checkInstallation,
    27→  setViewMode,
    28→  setTileLayout
    29→}: UseWorkspaceLoaderOptions): UseWorkspaceLoaderReturn {
    30→  const {
    31→    setProjects,
    32→    setCategories,
    33→    addTab,
    34→    clearTabs
    35→  } = useWorkspaceStore()
    36→
    37→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    38→  const [currentTheme, setCurrentTheme] = useState<Theme>(themes[0])
    39→  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<AppSettings | null>(null)
    40→  const initRef = useRef(false)
    41→  const hadProjectsRef = useRef(false)
    42→
    43→  // Load workspace on mount and restore tabs
    44→  useEffect(() => {
    45→    // Prevent double initialization from StrictMode
    46→    if (initRef.current) return
    47→    initRef.current = true
    48→
    49→    const loadWorkspace = async () => {
    50→      try {
    51→        // Check if Claude, npm, and git-bash are installed
    52→        await checkInstallation()
    53→
    54→        // Load and apply theme with any saved customizations
    55→        const loadedSettings = await api.getSettings()
    56→        setSettings(loadedSettings)
    57→        const theme = getThemeById(loadedSettings.theme || 'default')
    58→        applyTheme(theme, loadedSettings.themeCustomization)
    59→        setCurrentTheme(theme)
    60→
    61→        // Kill any existing PTYs from hot reload (but don't clear buffers - they'll be restored)
    62→        const existingTabs = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs
    63→        for (const tab of existingTabs) {
    64→          api.killPty(tab.id)
    65→        }
    66→        clearTabs()
    67→
    68→        const workspace = await api.getWorkspace()
    69→        if (workspace.projects) {
    70→          setProjects(workspace.projects)
    71→          if (workspace.projects.length > 0) {
    72→            hadProjectsRef.current = true
    73→          }
    74→          // Install TTS instructions for all existing projects
    75→          for (const project of workspace.projects) {
    76→            await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(project.path)
    77→          }
    78→        }
    79→        // Load categories
    80→        if (workspace.categories) {
    81→          setCategories(workspace.categories)
    82→        }
    83→
    84→        // Restore previously open tabs (only if not already open)
    85→        // Track old ID -> new ID mapping for layout restoration
    86→        const idMapping = new Map<string, string>()
    87→
    88→        if (workspace.openTabs && workspace.openTabs.length > 0) {
    89→          const currentTabs = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs
    90→          const usedSessionIds = new Set(currentTabs.map(t => t.sessionId).filter(Boolean))
    91→          const sessionsCache = new Map<string, { list: { sessionId: string; slug: string }[]; nextIndex: number }>()
    92→
    93→          for (const savedTab of workspace.openTabs) {
    94→            try {
    95→              // Always install TTS instructions so Claude uses <tts> tags
    96→              await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(savedTab.projectPath)
    97→
    98→              const projectName = savedTab.projectPath.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || savedTab.projectPath
    99→              let titleToRestore = savedTab.title || `${projectName} - New`
   100→
   101→              // Get project and determine effective backend for restored tab
   102→              const projectForTab = workspace.projects?.find((p: { path: string }) => p.path === savedTab.projectPath)
   103→              const savedBackend = savedTab.backend
   104→              const effectiveBackendForTab = (savedBackend
   105→                || (projectForTab?.backend && projectForTab.backend !== 'default'
   106→                  ? projectForTab.backend
   107→                  : (loadedSettings?.backend && loadedSettings.backend !== 'default'
   108→                    ? loadedSettings.backend
   109→                    : 'claude'))) as BackendId
   110→
   111→              let sessionIdToRestore: string | undefined = savedTab.sessionId
   112→
   113→              // Always discover sessions to find the most recent one
   114→              let sessionsForProject = sessionsCache.get(savedTab.projectPath)
   115→              if (!sessionsForProject) {
   116→                const list = await api.discoverSessions(savedTab.projectPath, effectiveBackendForTab)
   117→                sessionsForProject = { list, nextIndex: 0 }
   118→                sessionsCache.set(savedTab.projectPath, sessionsForProject)
   119→              }
   120→
   121→              const list = sessionsForProject.list || []
   122→              for (let i = sessionsForProject.nextIndex; i < list.length; i++) {
   123→                const candidate = list[i]
   124→                if (!usedSessionIds.has(candidate.sessionId)) {
   125→                  sessionIdToRestore = candidate.sessionId
   126→                  titleToRestore = `${projectName} - ${candidate.slug}`
   127→                  sessionsForProject.nextIndex = i + 1
   128→                  break
   129→                }
   130→              }
   131→
   132→              const ptyId = await api.spawnPty(
   133→                savedTab.projectPath,
   134→                sessionIdToRestore,
   135→                undefined,
   136→                effectiveBackendForTab
   137→              )
   138→              if (savedTab.id) {
   139→                idMapping.set(savedTab.id, ptyId)
   140→              }
   141→
   142→              addTab({
   143→                id: ptyId,
   144→                projectPath: savedTab.projectPath,
   145→                sessionId: sessionIdToRestore,
   146→                title: titleToRestore,
   147→                ptyId,
   148→                backend: effectiveBackendForTab
   149→              })
   150→              if (sessionIdToRestore) {
   151→                usedSessionIds.add(sessionIdToRestore)
   152→              }
   153→            } catch (e) {
   154→              console.error('Failed to restore tab:', savedTab.projectPath, e)
   155→            }
   156→          }
   157→        }
   158→
   159→        // Clean up orphaned terminal buffers from previous session/HMR
   160→        const activeTabIds = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs.map(t => t.id)
   161→        cleanupOrphanedBuffers(activeTabIds)
   162→
   163→        // Restore view mode
   164→        if (workspace.viewMode) {
   165→          setViewMode(workspace.viewMode)
   166→        }
   167→        // Restore tileLayout with mapped IDs and migrate legacy format
   168→        if (workspace.tileLayout && workspace.tileLayout.length > 0 && idMapping.size > 0) {
   169→          const mappedLayout = workspace.tileLayout
   170→            .map(tile => {
   171→              // Migrate legacy tiles: add tabIds/activeTabId if missing
   172→              const tabIds = tile.tabIds || [tile.id]
   173→              const mappedTabIds = tabIds
   174→                .map(id => idMapping.get(id) || id)
   175→                .filter(id => {
   176→                  // Only keep tab IDs that exist in the current session
   177→                  const currentTabs = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs
   178→                  return currentTabs.some(t => t.id === id)
   179→                })
   180→
   181→              if (mappedTabIds.length === 0) return null
   182→
   183→              const newId = idMapping.get(tile.id) || mappedTabIds[0]
   184→              const activeTabId = tile.activeTabId
   185→                ? (idMapping.get(tile.activeTabId) || mappedTabIds[0])
   186→                : mappedTabIds[0]
   187→
   188→              return {
   189→                ...tile,
   190→                id: newId,
   191→                tabIds: mappedTabIds,
   192→                activeTabId
   193→              }
   194→            })
   195→            .filter((tile): tile is NonNullable<typeof tile> => tile !== null)
   196→
   197→          if (mappedLayout.length > 0) {
   198→            setTileLayout(mappedLayout)
   199→          }
   200→        }
   201→      } catch (e) {
   202→        console.error('Failed to load workspace:', e)
   203→      }
   204→      setLoading(false)
   205→    }
   206→    loadWorkspace()
   207→  }, [api, addTab, clearTabs, checkInstallation, setProjects, setCategories, setViewMode, setTileLayout])
   208→
   209→  return {
   210→    loading,
   211→    currentTheme,
   212→    settings,
   213→    setCurrentTheme,
   214→    setSettings
   215→  }
   216→}

     3→import type { BackendId } from '../api/types'
     4→import type { AppSettings } from './useSettings'
     5→import { useWorkspaceStore } from '../stores/workspace'
     6→import { Theme, getThemeById, applyTheme, themes } from '../themes'
     7→import { cleanupOrphanedBuffers } from '../components/terminal/Terminal'
     8→
     9→interface UseWorkspaceLoaderOptions {
    10→  api: Api
    11→  checkInstallation: () => Promise<void>
    12→  setViewMode: (mode: 'tabs' | 'tiled') => void
    13→  setTileLayout: (layout: any[]) => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→interface UseWorkspaceLoaderReturn {
    17→  loading: boolean
    18→  currentTheme: Theme
    19→  settings: AppSettings | null
    20→  setCurrentTheme: (theme: Theme) => void
    21→  setSettings: (settings: AppSettings | null) => void
    22→}
    23→
    24→export function useWorkspaceLoader({
    25→  api,
    26→  checkInstallation,
    27→  setViewMode,
    28→  setTileLayout
    29→}: UseWorkspaceLoaderOptions): UseWorkspaceLoaderReturn {
    30→  const {
    31→    setProjects,
    32→    setCategories,
    33→    addTab,
    34→    clearTabs
    35→  } = useWorkspaceStore()
    36→
    37→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    38→  const [currentTheme, setCurrentTheme] = useState<Theme>(themes[0])
    39→  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<AppSettings | null>(null)
    40→  const initRef = useRef(false)
    41→  const hadProjectsRef = useRef(false)
    42→
    43→  // Load workspace on mount and restore tabs
    44→  useEffect(() => {
    45→    // Prevent double initialization from StrictMode
    46→    if (initRef.current) return
    47→    initRef.current = true
    48→
    49→    const loadWorkspace = async () => {
    50→      try {
    51→        // Check if Claude, npm, and git-bash are installed
    52→        await checkInstallation()
    53→
    54→        // Load and apply theme with any saved customizations
    55→        const loadedSettings = await api.getSettings()
    56→        setSettings(loadedSettings)
    57→        const theme = getThemeById(loadedSettings.theme || 'default')
    58→        applyTheme(theme, loadedSettings.themeCustomization)
    59→        setCurrentTheme(theme)
    60→
    61→        // Kill any existing PTYs from hot reload (but don't clear buffers - they'll be restored)
    62→        const existingTabs = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs
    63→        for (const tab of existingTabs) {
    64→          api.killPty(tab.id)
    65→        }
    66→        clearTabs()
    67→
    68→        const workspace = await api.getWorkspace()
    69→        if (workspace.projects) {
    70→          setProjects(workspace.projects)
    71→          if (workspace.projects.length > 0) {
    72→            hadProjectsRef.current = true
    73→          }
    74→          // Install TTS instructions for all existing projects
    75→          for (const project of workspace.projects) {
    76→            await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(project.path)
    77→          }
    78→        }
    79→        // Load categories
    80→        if (workspace.categories) {
    81→          setCategories(workspace.categories)
    82→        }
    83→
    84→        // Restore previously open tabs (only if not already open)
    85→        // Track old ID -> new ID mapping for layout restoration
    86→        const idMapping = new Map<string, string>()
    87→
    88→        if (workspace.openTabs && workspace.openTabs.length > 0) {
    89→          const currentTabs = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs
    90→          const usedSessionIds = new Set(currentTabs.map(t => t.sessionId).filter(Boolean))
    91→          const sessionsCache = new Map<string, { list: { sessionId: string; slug: string }[]; nextIndex: number }>()
    92→
    93→          for (const savedTab of workspace.openTabs) {
    94→            try {
    95→              // Always install TTS instructions so Claude uses <tts> tags
    96→              await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(savedTab.projectPath)
    97→
    98→              const projectName = savedTab.projectPath.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || savedTab.projectPath
    99→              let titleToRestore = savedTab.title || `${projectName} - New`
   100→
   101→              // Get project and determine effective backend for restored tab
   102→              const projectForTab = workspace.projects?.find((p: { path: string }) => p.path === savedTab.projectPath)
   103→              const savedBackend = savedTab.backend
   104→              const effectiveBackendForTab = (savedBackend
   105→                || (projectForTab?.backend && projectForTab.backend !== 'default'
   106→                  ? projectForTab.backend
   107→                  : (loadedSettings?.backend && loadedSettings.backend !== 'default'
   108→                    ? loadedSettings.backend
   109→                    : 'claude'))) as BackendId
   110→
   111→              let sessionIdToRestore: string | undefined = savedTab.sessionId
   112→
   113→              // Always discover sessions to find the most recent one
   114→              let sessionsForProject = sessionsCache.get(savedTab.projectPath)
   115→              if (!sessionsForProject) {
   116→                const list = await api.discoverSessions(savedTab.projectPath, effectiveBackendForTab)
   117→                sessionsForProject = { list, nextIndex: 0 }
   118→                sessionsCache.set(savedTab.projectPath, sessionsForProject)
   119→              }
   120→
   121→              const list = sessionsForProject.list || []
   122→              for (let i = sessionsForProject.nextIndex; i < list.length; i++) {
   123→                const candidate = list[i]
   124→                if (!usedSessionIds.has(candidate.sessionId)) {
   125→                  sessionIdToRestore = candidate.sessionId
   126→                  titleToRestore = `${projectName} - ${candidate.slug}`
   127→                  sessionsForProject.nextIndex = i + 1
   128→                  break
   129→                }
   130→              }
   131→
   132→              const ptyId = await api.spawnPty(
   133→                savedTab.projectPath,
   134→                sessionIdToRestore,
   135→                undefined,
   136→                effectiveBackendForTab
   137→              )
   138→              if (savedTab.id) {
   139→                idMapping.set(savedTab.id, ptyId)
   140→              }
   141→
   142→              addTab({
   143→                id: ptyId,
   144→                projectPath: savedTab.projectPath,
   145→                sessionId: sessionIdToRestore,
   146→                title: titleToRestore,
   147→                ptyId,
   148→                backend: effectiveBackendForTab
   149→              })
   150→              if (sessionIdToRestore) {
   151→                usedSessionIds.add(sessionIdToRestore)
   152→              }
   153→            } catch (e) {
   154→              console.error('Failed to restore tab:', savedTab.projectPath, e)
   155→            }
   156→          }
   157→        }
   158→
   159→        // Clean up orphaned terminal buffers from previous session/HMR
   160→        const activeTabIds = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs.map(t => t.id)
   161→        cleanupOrphanedBuffers(activeTabIds)
   162→
   163→        // Restore view mode
   164→        if (workspace.viewMode) {
   165→          setViewMode(workspace.viewMode)
   166→        }
   167→        // Restore tileLayout with mapped IDs and migrate legacy format
   168→        if (workspace.tileLayout && workspace.tileLayout.length > 0 && idMapping.size > 0) {
   169→          const mappedLayout = workspace.tileLayout
   170→            .map(tile => {
   171→              // Migrate legacy tiles: add tabIds/activeTabId if missing
   172→              const tabIds = tile.tabIds || [tile.id]
   173→              const mappedTabIds = tabIds
   174→                .map(id => idMapping.get(id) || id)
   175→                .filter(id => {
   176→                  // Only keep tab IDs that exist in the current session
   177→                  const currentTabs = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs
   178→                  return currentTabs.some(t => t.id === id)
   179→                })
   180→
   181→              if (mappedTabIds.length === 0) return null
   182→
   183→              const newId = idMapping.get(tile.id) || mappedTabIds[0]
   184→              const activeTabId = tile.activeTabId
   185→                ? (idMapping.get(tile.activeTabId) || mappedTabIds[0])
   186→                : mappedTabIds[0]
   187→
   188→              return {
   189→                ...tile,
   190→                id: newId,
   191→                tabIds: mappedTabIds,
   192→                activeTabId
   193→              }
   194→            })
   195→            .filter((tile): tile is NonNullable<typeof tile> => tile !== null)
   196→
   197→          if (mappedLayout.length > 0) {
   198→            setTileLayout(mappedLayout)
   199→          }
   200→        }
   201→      } catch (e) {
   202→        console.error('Failed to load workspace:', e)
   203→      }
   204→      setLoading(false)
   205→    }
   206→    loadWorkspace()
   207→  }, [api, addTab, clearTabs, checkInstallation, setProjects, setCategories, setViewMode, setTileLayout])
   208→
   209→  return {
   210→    loading,
   211→    currentTheme,
   212→    settings,
   213→    setCurrentTheme,
   214→    setSettings
   215→  }
   216→}
   217→

1→import React, { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { ConnectionScreen } from '../components/ConnectionScreen'
     3→import { MainApp } from './MainApp'
     4→import type { Api, HttpBackend } from '../api'
     5→import { isElectronEnvironment, initializeApi } from '../api'
     6→
     7→// Check if running in Capacitor native app
     8→export function isCapacitorApp(): boolean {
     9→  return typeof window !== 'undefined' &&
    10→         typeof (window as any).Capacitor !== 'undefined' &&
    11→         (window as any).Capacitor?.isNativePlatform?.() === true
    12→}
    13→
    14→// Helper to validate port
    15→function isValidPort(port: number): boolean {
    16→  return typeof port === 'number' && Number.isInteger(port) && port >= 1 && port <= 65535
    17→}
    18→
    19→export function AppConnection(): React.ReactElement | null {
    20→  // Check if we're running in Electron or browser/Capacitor
    21→  const isElectron = isElectronEnvironment()
    22→  const isCapacitor = isCapacitorApp()
    23→
    24→  // Add mobile class to body for CSS targeting
    25→  useEffect(() => {
    26→    if (isCapacitor || !isElectron) {
    27→      document.body.classList.add('is-mobile-app')
    28→    }
    29→    return () => {
    30→      document.body.classList.remove('is-mobile-app')
    31→    }
    32→  }, [isCapacitor, isElectron])
    33→
    34→  // Connection state for browser/Capacitor mode
    35→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(isElectron)
    36→  const [api, setApiState] = useState<Api | null>(isElectron ? initializeApi() : null)
    37→
    38→  // Handle successful connection from ConnectionScreen
    39→  const handleConnected = useCallback((connectedApi: HttpBackend) => {
    40→    setApiState(connectedApi)
    41→    setIsConnected(true)
    42→  }, [])
    43→
    44→  // Handle disconnect - return to connection screen but keep saved hosts
    45→  const handleDisconnect = useCallback(() => {
    46→    console.log('[App] Disconnecting...')
    47→    // Only clear the active connection, keep saved hosts for easy reconnect
    48→    localStorage.removeItem('claude-terminal-connection')
    49→    // Don't clear saved hosts: localStorage.removeItem('claude-terminal-saved-hosts')
    50→    // Set flag to prevent auto-reconnect (cleared on next app launch)
    51→    sessionStorage.setItem('claude-terminal-manual-disconnect', 'true')
    52→    setApiState(null)
    53→    setIsConnected(false)
    54→  }, [])
    55→
    56→  // Try to restore saved connection on mount (browser/Capacitor only)
    57→  // Also check for token in URL query string (from server redirect)
    58→  useEffect(() => {
    59→    if (isElectron || isConnected) return
    60→
    61→    // Check for token in URL (from server redirect)
    62→    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search)
    63→    const urlToken = urlParams.get('token')
    64→
    65→    if (urlToken) {
    66→      // We have a token from URL - extract host/port from current location
    67→      const host = window.location.hostname
    68→      const port = parseInt(window.location.port) || 38470
    69→
    70→      // Validate port before saving
    71→      if (!isValidPort(port)) {
    72→        console.error('[App] Invalid port from URL:', port)
    73→        return
    74→      }
    75→
    76→      // Save to localStorage so future reloads work
    77→      const config = { host, port, token: urlToken }
    78→      localStorage.setItem('claude-terminal-connection', JSON.stringify(config))
    79→
    80→      // Clear token from URL for cleaner appearance
    81→      window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, window.location.pathname)
    82→
    83→      console.log('[App] Connecting with URL token:', { host, port, tokenLength: urlToken.length })
    84→    }
    85→
    86→    try {
    87→      const saved = localStorage.getItem('claude-terminal-connection')
    88→      if (saved) {
    89→        const config = JSON.parse(saved)
    90→        // Validate port from saved config
    91→        if (config.host && config.token && isValidPort(config.port)) {
    92→          // We have valid saved config, the ConnectionScreen will auto-connect
    93→        } else if (config.port && !isValidPort(config.port)) {
    94→          console.error('[App] Invalid port in saved config:', config.port, '- clearing')
    95→          localStorage.removeItem('claude-terminal-connection')
    96→        }
    97→      }
    98→    } catch (e) {
    99→      // Invalid saved config, ignore
   100→    }
   101→  }, [isElectron, isConnected])
   102→
   103→  // Show connection screen if not connected (browser/Capacitor mode)
   104→  if (!isConnected || !api) {
   105→    // Try to get saved config for auto-connect
   106→    let savedConfig: { host: string; port: number; token: string } | null = null
   107→    try {
   108→      const saved = localStorage.getItem('claude-terminal-connection')
   109→      if (saved) {
   110→        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved)
   111→        // Only use config if port is valid
   112→        if (parsed && isValidPort(parsed.port)) {
   113→          savedConfig = parsed
   114→        } else if (parsed?.port) {
   115→          console.error('[App] Discarding saved config with invalid port:', parsed.port)
   116→        }
   117→      }
   118→    } catch {
   119→      // Ignore
   120→    }
   121→
   122→    return <ConnectionScreen onConnected={handleConnected} savedConfig={savedConfig} />
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  // Render the main app with the connected API
   126→  return <MainApp api={api} isElectron={isElectron} onDisconnect={handleDisconnect} />
   127→}

import { ipcRenderer, webUtils, IpcRendererEvent } from 'electron'
import type { Settings } from '../types/settings.js'
import type { Extension } from '../types/extension.js'

export const miscHandlers = {
  // Settings
  getSettings: (): Promise<Settings> => ipcRenderer.invoke('settings:get'),
  saveSettings: (settings: Settings): Promise<void> => ipcRenderer.invoke('settings:save', settings),
  selectDirectory: (): Promise<string | null> => ipcRenderer.invoke('settings:selectDirectory'),

  // Project creation
  createProject: (name: string, parentDir: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('project:create', { name, parentDir }),

  // Executable
  selectExecutable: (): Promise<string | null> => ipcRenderer.invoke('executable:select'),
  runExecutable: (executable: string, cwd: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('executable:run', { executable, cwd }),

  // API Server
  apiStart: (projectPath: string, port: number) => ipcRenderer.invoke('api:start', { projectPath, port }),
  apiStop: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('api:stop', projectPath),
  apiStatus: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('api:status', projectPath),
  onApiOpenSession: (callback: (data: { projectPath: string; autoClose: boolean; model?: string }) => void): (() => void) => {
    const handler = (_: IpcRendererEvent, data: { projectPath: string; autoClose: boolean; model?: string }) => callback(data)
    ipcRenderer.on('api:open-session', handler)
    return () => ipcRenderer.removeListener('api:open-session', handler)
  },

  // Mobile Server
  mobileGetConnectionInfo: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('mobile:getConnectionInfo'),
  mobileRegenerateToken: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('mobile:regenerateToken'),
  mobileIsRunning: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('mobile:isRunning'),
  mobileSendFile: (filePath: string, message?: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('mobile:sendFile', filePath, message),
  mobileGetConnectedClients: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('mobile:getConnectedClients'),
  mobileGetPendingFiles: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('mobile:getPendingFiles'),

  // Updater
  getVersion: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('updater:getVersion'),
  checkForUpdate: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('updater:check'),
  downloadUpdate: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('updater:download'),
  installUpdate: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('updater:install'),
  onUpdaterStatus: (callback: (data: { status: string; version?: string; progress?: number; error?: string }) => void): (() => void) => {
    const handler = (_: IpcRendererEvent, data: { status: string; version?: string; progress?: number; error?: string }) => callback(data)
    ipcRenderer.on('updater:status', handler)
    return () => ipcRenderer.removeListener('updater:status', handler)
  },

  // Clipboard
  readClipboardImage: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('clipboard:readImage'),

  // File utilities
  getPathForFile: (file: File): string => webUtils.getPathForFile(file),

  // Window controls
  windowMinimize: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('window:minimize'),
  windowMaximize: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('window:maximize'),
  windowClose: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('window:close'),
  windowIsMaximized: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('window:isMaximized'),

  // Debug logging
  debugLog: (message: string) => ipcRenderer.send('debug:log', message),

  // App utilities
  isDebugMode: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('app:isDebugMode'),
  refresh: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('app:refresh'),
  openExternal: (url: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('app:openExternal', url),

  // Custom commands
  commandsSave: (name: string, content: string, projectPath: string | null) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('commands:save', { name, content, projectPath }),

  // CLAUDE.md editor
  claudeMdRead: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('claudemd:read', projectPath),
  claudeMdSave: (projectPath: string, content: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('claudemd:save', { projectPath, content }),

  // Auto Work mode marker
  autoworkSetActive: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('autowork:setActive', projectPath),
  autoworkClearActive: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('autowork:clearActive', projectPath),

  // Extensions
  extensionsFetchRegistry: (forceRefresh?: boolean) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:fetchRegistry', forceRefresh),
  extensionsFetchFromUrl: (url: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:fetchFromUrl', url),
  extensionsInstallSkill: (extension: Extension, scope?: 'global' | 'project', projectPath?: string) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:installSkill', { extension, scope, projectPath }),
  extensionsInstallMcp: (extension: Extension, config?: Record<string, unknown>) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:installMcp', { extension, config }),
  extensionsRemove: (extensionId: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:remove', extensionId),
  extensionsUpdate: (extensionId: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:update', extensionId),
  extensionsGetInstalled: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:getInstalled'),
  extensionsGetForProject: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:getForProject', projectPath),
  extensionsGetCommands: (projectPath: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:getCommands', projectPath),
  extensionsGetConfig: (extensionId: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:getConfig', extensionId),
  extensionsSetConfig: (extensionId: string, config: Record<string, unknown>) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:setConfig', { extensionId, config }),
  extensionsEnableForProject: (extensionId: string, projectPath: string) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:enableForProject', { extensionId, projectPath }),
  extensionsDisableForProject: (extensionId: string, projectPath: string) =>
    ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:disableForProject', { extensionId, projectPath }),
  extensionsAddCustomUrl: (url: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:addCustomUrl', url),
  extensionsRemoveCustomUrl: (url: string) => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:removeCustomUrl', url),
  extensionsGetCustomUrls: () => ipcRenderer.invoke('extensions:getCustomUrls')
}

import React, { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef, RefObject } from 'react'
import { TitleBar } from '../components/TitleBar'
import { Sidebar } from '../components/Sidebar'
import { TerminalTabs } from '../components/TerminalTabs'
import { Terminal } from '../components/terminal/Terminal'
import { TiledTerminalView } from '../components/TiledTerminalView'
import { SettingsModal } from '../components/SettingsModal'
import { MakeProjectModal } from '../components/MakeProjectModal'
import { ErrorBoundary } from '../components/ErrorBoundary'
import { FileBrowser } from '../components/mobile/FileBrowser'
import type { HostConfig } from '../hooks/useHostConnection'
import { useWorkspaceStore } from '../stores/workspace'
import { useVoice } from '../contexts/VoiceContext'
import { useModals } from '../contexts/ModalContext'
import {
  useInstallation,
  useUpdater,
  useViewState,
  useWorkspaceLoader,
  useSessionPolling,
  useApiListeners,
  useProjectHandlers
} from '../hooks'
import type { Api } from '../api'
import { InstallationPrompt } from './InstallationPrompt'
import { MobileConnectModal } from './MobileConnectModal'

export interface MainAppProps {
  api: Api
  isElectron: boolean
  onDisconnect?: () => void
}

export function MainApp({ api, isElectron, onDisconnect }: MainAppProps): React.ReactElement {
  const {
    projects,
    openTabs,
    activeTabId,
    categories,
    addProject,
    removeProject,
    updateProject,
    addTab,
    removeTab,
    updateTab,
    setActiveTab
  } = useWorkspaceStore()

  const { voiceOutputEnabled, setProjectVoice } = useVoice()
  const voiceOutputEnabledRef = useRef(voiceOutputEnabled)

  // Modal state from context
  const { settingsOpen, makeProjectOpen, openSettings, closeSettings, openMakeProject, closeMakeProject } = useModals()

  // Installation state from hook
  const {
    claudeInstalled,
    npmInstalled,
    gitBashInstalled,
    installing,
    installError,
    installMessage,
    checkInstallation,
    handleInstallNode,
    handleInstallGit,
    handleInstallClaude
  } = useInstallation()

  // Updater state from hook
  const { appVersion, updateStatus, downloadUpdate, installUpdate } = useUpdater()

  // View state from hook
  const {
    viewMode,
    tileLayout,
    lastFocusedTabId,
    sidebarWidth,
    sidebarCollapsed,
    setViewMode,
    setTileLayout,
    setLastFocusedTabId,
    setSidebarWidth,
    setSidebarCollapsed,
    toggleViewMode
  } = useViewState()

  // Workspace loader hook
  const {
    loading,
    currentTheme,
    settings,
    setCurrentTheme,
    setSettings
  } = useWorkspaceLoader({
    api,
    checkInstallation,
    setViewMode,
    setTileLayout
  })

1→/**
     2→ * Project Routes - Workspace
     3→ *
     4→ * HTTP endpoints for workspace and project list management.
     5→ */
     6→
     7→import { Router, Request, Response } from 'express'
     8→import { Workspace } from '../../types.js'
     9→import { getServices } from '../../app.js'
    10→import { sendResponse, sendError } from './helpers.js'
    11→
    12→const router = Router()
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * GET /api/projects
    16→ * Get the full workspace including all projects
    17→ *
    18→ * Returns: Workspace
    19→ */
    20→router.get('/', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
    21→  try {
    22→    const services = getServices()
    23→
    24→    if (!services.getWorkspace) {
    25→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Workspace service not available')
    26→    }
    27→
    28→    const workspace: Workspace = await services.getWorkspace()
    29→
    30→    sendResponse(res, 200, {
    31→      success: true,
    32→      data: workspace,
    33→      timestamp: Date.now()
    34→    })
    35→  } catch (error: any) {
    36→    console.error('[Projects Route] Get workspace error:', error)
    37→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to get workspace')
    38→  }
    39→})
    40→
    41→/**
    42→ * PUT /api/projects
    43→ * Save the full workspace
    44→ *
    45→ * Body: Workspace
    46→ */
    47→router.put('/', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
    48→  try {
    49→    const services = getServices()
    50→
    51→    if (!services.saveWorkspace) {
    52→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Workspace service not available')
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    const workspace: Workspace = req.body
    56→
    57→    if (!workspace || !Array.isArray(workspace.projects)) {
    58→      return sendError(res, 400, 'Invalid workspace data')
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    await services.saveWorkspace(workspace)
    62→
    63→    sendResponse(res, 200, {
    64→      success: true,
    65→      timestamp: Date.now()
    66→    })
    67→  } catch (error: any) {
    68→    console.error('[Projects Route] Save workspace error:', error)
    69→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to save workspace')
    70→  }
    71→})
    72→
    73→/**
    74→ * GET /api/projects/list
    75→ * Get just the list of projects (convenience endpoint)
    76→ *
    77→ * Returns: Project[]
    78→ */
    79→router.get('/list', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
    80→  try {
    81→    const services = getServices()
    82→
    83→    if (!services.getWorkspace) {
    84→      return sendError(res, 503, 'Workspace service not available')
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    const workspace: Workspace = await services.getWorkspace()
    88→
    89→    sendResponse(res, 200, {
    90→      success: true,
    91→      data: workspace.projects,
    92→      timestamp: Date.now()
    93→    })
    94→  } catch (error: any) {
    95→    sendError(res, 500, error.message || 'Failed to get projects')
    96→  }
    97→})
    98→
    99→export default router
   100→

1→import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→import type { Api } from '../api'
     3→import type { BackendId } from '../api/types'
     4→import type { AppSettings } from './useSettings'
     5→import { OpenTab, Project } from '../stores/workspace'
     6→import { TileLayout, DropZone, splitTile, addTileToLayout, addTabToExistingTile } from '../components/TiledTerminalView'
     7→import { clearTerminalBuffer } from '../components/terminal/Terminal'
     8→
     9→interface UseProjectHandlersOptions {
    10→  api: Api
    11→  projects: Project[]
    12→  openTabs: OpenTab[]
    13→  settings: AppSettings | null
    14→  tileLayout: TileLayout[]
    15→  addProject: (project: { path: string; name: string }) => void
    16→  removeTab: (id: string) => void
    17→  addTab: (tab: OpenTab) => void
    18→  setActiveTab: (id: string) => void
    19→  setTileLayout: (layout: TileLayout[]) => void
    20→}
    21→
    22→interface ClosedTabInfo {
    23→  projectPath: string
    24→  sessionId?: string
    25→  title: string
    26→  backend?: string
    27→}
    28→
    29→interface UseProjectHandlersReturn {
    30→  handleAddProject: () => Promise<void>
    31→  handleAddProjectsFromParent: () => Promise<void>
    32→  handleOpenSession: (projectPath: string, sessionId?: string, slug?: string, initialPrompt?: string, forceNewSession?: boolean) => Promise<void>
    33→  handleOpenSessionAtPosition: (projectPath: string, dropZone: DropZone | null, containerSize: { width: number; height: number }, currentLayout?: TileLayout[]) => Promise<void>
    34→  handleCloseTab: (tabId: string) => void
    35→  handleCloseProjectTabs: (projectPath: string) => void
    36→  handleProjectCreated: (projectPath: string, projectName: string) => void
    37→  handleUndoCloseTab: () => void
    38→  canUndoCloseTab: boolean
    39→}
    40→
    41→export function useProjectHandlers({
    42→  api,
    43→  projects,
    44→  openTabs,
    45→  settings,
    46→  tileLayout,
    47→  addProject,
    48→  removeTab,
    49→  addTab,
    50→  setActiveTab,
    51→  setTileLayout
    52→}: UseProjectHandlersOptions): UseProjectHandlersReturn {
    53→  const closedTabsRef = useRef<ClosedTabInfo[]>([])
    54→  const [closedTabCount, setClosedTabCount] = useState(0)
    55→
    56→  // Keep a ref to the latest tileLayout so async callbacks always read the freshest state
    57→  const tileLayoutRef = useRef(tileLayout)
    58→  tileLayoutRef.current = tileLayout
    59→
    60→  const handleAddProject = useCallback(async () => {
    61→    const path = await api.addProject()
    62→    if (path) {
    63→      const name = path.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || path
    64→      addProject({ path, name })
    65→      await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(path)
    66→    }
    67→  }, [api, addProject])
    68→
    69→  const handleAddProjectsFromParent = useCallback(async () => {
    70→    const projectsToAdd = await api.addProjectsFromParent?.()
    71→    if (projectsToAdd && projectsToAdd.length > 0) {
    72→      const existingPaths = new Set(projects.map((p) => p.path))
    73→      const newProjects = projectsToAdd.filter((p) => !existingPaths.has(p.path))
    74→
    75→      for (const project of newProjects) {
    76→        addProject({ path: project.path, name: project.name })
    77→        await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(project.path)
    78→      }
    79→    }
    80→  }, [api, addProject, projects])
    81→
    82→  const handleOpenSession = useCallback(async (projectPath: string, sessionId?: string, slug?: string, initialPrompt?: string, forceNewSession?: boolean) => {
    83→    // Check if this session is already open
    84→    if (sessionId) {
    85→      const existingTab = openTabs.find(tab => tab.sessionId === sessionId)
    86→      if (existingTab) {
    87→        setActiveTab(existingTab.id)
    88→        return
    89→      }
    90→    }
    91→
    92→    // Get project and determine effective backend
    93→    const project = projects.find((p) => p.path === projectPath)
    94→    const effectiveBackend = (project?.backend && project.backend !== 'default'
    95→      ? project.backend
    96→      : (settings?.backend && settings.backend !== 'default'
    97→        ? settings.backend
    98→        : 'claude')) as BackendId
    99→
   100→    // Only discover sessions if no specific sessionId was requested
   101→    if (!forceNewSession && !sessionId) {
   102→      try {
   103→        const sessions = await api.discoverSessions(projectPath, effectiveBackend)
   104→        if (sessions.length > 0) {
   105→          const [mostRecent] = sessions
   106→          const existingTab = openTabs.find((tab) => tab.sessionId === mostRecent.sessionId)
   107→
   108→          if (existingTab) {
   109→            setActiveTab(existingTab.id)
   110→            return
   111→          }
   112→          sessionId = mostRecent.sessionId
   113→          slug = mostRecent.slug
   114→        }
   115→      } catch (e) {
   116→        console.error('Failed to discover sessions for project:', e)
   117→      }
   118→    }
   119→
   120→    const projectName = projectPath.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || projectPath
   121→    const title = slug ? `${projectName} - ${slug}` : `${projectName} - New`
   122→
   123→    try {
   124→      await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(projectPath)
   125→
   126→      const ptyId = await api.spawnPty(projectPath, sessionId, undefined, effectiveBackend)
   127→
   128→      // Compute tile layout BEFORE adding tab so both update together,
   129→      // preventing useEffectiveLayout from auto-adding at the wrong position
   130→      const currentLayout = tileLayoutRef.current
   131→      const newLayout = addTileToLayout(currentLayout, ptyId, null, window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight)
   132→
   133→      addTab({
   134→        id: ptyId,
   135→        projectPath,
   136→        sessionId,
   137→        title,
   138→        ptyId,
   139→        backend: effectiveBackend
   140→      })
   141→      setTileLayout(newLayout)
   142→
   143→      // If an initial prompt was provided, send it after a short delay
   144→      if (initialPrompt) {
   145→        setTimeout(() => {
   146→          api.writePty(ptyId, initialPrompt)
   147→          setTimeout(() => {
   148→            api.writePty(ptyId, '\r')
   149→          }, 100)
   150→        }, 1500)
